Personal space

About me

Work, interests, notes, and experiments across graphics, games, research, and creative projects.

Rendering

Graphics engineering, engine work, and technical depth.

Making

Games, tools, personal projects, and original systems.

Curiosity

Math, music, worldbuilding, and everything adjacent.

Hi.

My name is Vlad. I am a rendering engineer from Estonia. I started my career path as a game developer in Unity, then Unreal Engine, and now I work on a proprietary game engine under NDA while also building my own one.

I have broad experience across the game development pipeline, from game design, 3D modeling, and sound design to technical research, market research, analytics, and more. Rendering is still the area where I go deepest.

Besides that, I am interested in a few other directions too.

I do:

  • Worldbuilding
  • Game development
  • Researching
  • Math
  • Music

Contact

If you want to reach out, use the form below and your email app will open a draft addressed to me. You can also view my CV.

This website is still in progress, and information is being added gradually.
